attacking_style: Early opportunist seeking KOM points and breakaway opportunities rather than late-stage attacks. Shows willingness to be aggressive in opening stages of Grand Tours to contest classification points.
team_tactics: Appears given freedom to pursue breakaway opportunities and minor classifications in Grand Tours as a support rider without major GC protection requirements.
terrain_preference: Selective mountain stages where he can survive in reduced GC groups. Capable on categorized climbs sufficient to contest KOM points in breakaways.
vulnerability: Limited data but profile suggests domestique role rather than ability to challenge for stage wins or major GC positions in three-week races.
key_patterns: First-year Grand Tour rider showing early aggression for breakaways and KOM points (2 observations)
Capable of finishing with GC group on selective mountain stages, limiting losses (2 observations)
Targets opportunities suited to support riders rather than protected status (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: showed promising first Tour de France with both breakaway aggression and ability to survive selective mountain stages
